hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息；【CRYPTO】随着周末最糟糕的担忧消失，比特币脱离最低水平；【CRYPTO】霍尔木兹紧张局势再度紧张，停火反弹消退，比特币回落：分析师。

items.title: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.summary: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息
items.summary_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title: Bitcoin moves off lowest levels as worst of weekend fears slip away
items.summary: As the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz goes into effect, reports say Iran is considering the abandonment of uranium enrichment as a way to end the war.
items.title_zh: 随着周末最糟糕的担忧消失，比特币脱离最低水平
items.summary_zh: 随着美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁生效，有报道称伊朗正在考虑放弃铀浓缩活动作为结束战争的一种方式。

items.title: Bitcoin pulls back as ceasefire rally fades amid renewed Hormuz tensions: analysts
items.summary: Analysts said bitcoin ETF inflows and a cleaner derivatives setup are keeping the market from breaking down.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹紧张局势再度紧张，停火反弹消退，比特币回落：分析师
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，比特币 ETF 的流入和更清洁的衍生品设置正在防止市场崩溃。

items.title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
items.summary: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的杰弗里·罗森伯格 (Jeffrey Rosenberg) 在该公司的流动性替代 ETF 中发挥着主导作用，该 ETF 在 ETF 包装中使用多空策略。

items.title: Behind China's 'active efforts' for an Iran ceasefire: Business trumps politics
items.summary: The big risk for Beijing is that the Iran war drags down global demand for the exports that are driving China's economic growth.
items.title_zh: 中国“积极努力”推动伊朗停火背后：商业胜过政治
items.summary_zh: 北京面临的最大风险是伊朗战争拖累了全球对推动中国经济增长的出口需求。

items.title: ClearBank secures MiCA approval, targets Circle euro, dollar stablecoins for institutional clients
items.summary: The U.K.- and EU-regulated credit institution gains crypto-asset service provider status and said it will connect clients to regulated stablecoin rails over Circle Mint
items.title_zh: ClearBank 获得 MiCA 批准，目标是为机构客户提供 Circle 欧元、美元稳定币
items.summary_zh: 这家受英国和欧盟监管的信贷机构获得了加密资产服务提供商地位，并表示将通过 Circle Mint 将客户连接到受监管的稳定币轨道

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Wants to Resume Talks
items.summary: The president did not say whether the United States had agreed to negotiate again. The U.S. military is blocking ships entering or leaving Iranian ports or coastal areas, in an effort to cut off Iran’s oil income.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普表示伊朗希望恢复谈判
items.summary_zh: 总统没有透露美国是否同意再次谈判。美国军方正在阻止船只进出伊朗港口或沿海地区，以切断伊朗的石油收入。

items.title: ‘Think bigger’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys another 13,927 bitcoin for $1 billion as holdings reach 780,897 BTC
items.summary: Strategy's holdings now account for more than 3.7% of the total 21 million bitcoin supply — worth around $55 billion.
items.title_zh: “想得更远”：Michael Saylor 的策略以 10 亿美元购买了另外 13,927 枚比特币，持有量达到 780,897 枚比特币
items.summary_zh: Strategy 持有的比特币目前占 2100 万枚比特币供应总量的 3.7% 以上，价值约 550 亿美元。

items.title: Crypto funds pull in $1.1 billion as bitcoin products lead strongest inflow week since January: CoinShares
items.summary: Crypto funds brought in $1.1 billion last week, their strongest inflow since January, as inflation and geopolitical tensions eased.
items.title_zh: CoinShares：比特币产品引领 1 月份以来最强劲的一周资金流入，加密货币基金吸纳 11 亿美元资金
items.summary_zh: 随着通货膨胀和地缘政治紧张局势的缓解，加密货币基金上周带来了 11 亿美元的资金流入，这是自 1 月份以来最强劲的流入。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
items.summary: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
items.title_zh: 债券市场对私人信贷危机的担忧如何在固定收益 ETF 中体现
items.summary_zh: 就在越来越多且透明度较低的债券市场被纳入更多固定收益 ETF 之际，对私人信贷危机的担忧也随之而来。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
items.summary: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在特朗普帖子提振股价后，他仍然看空 Palantir
items.summary_zh: 这位以“大空头”闻名的投资者表示，他继续持有这家人工智能软件公司的长期看跌期权。

items.title: Iran carried out highest number of executions in decades
items.summary: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
items.title_zh: 伊朗处决人数为数十年来最高
items.summary_zh: 许多组织警告称，今年早些时候席卷伊朗的反政府抗议活动之后，可能会有更多人被处决。

items.title: Orban Loss May Ease Hungary’s Tensions with European Union
items.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has stymied the European Union for years, and particularly in recent months. Peter Magyar’s election could change that.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班下台可能会缓解匈牙利与欧盟的紧张关系
items.summary_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班多年来一直阻碍欧盟，尤其是最近几个月。彼得·马扎尔的当选可能会改变这一点。

items.title: Israelis Don’t Feel Much Like Victors in War With Iran
items.summary: The regime in Iran has not changed and the nuclear and missile threats have not been eliminated, leaving many Israelis to wonder what this was all for.
items.title_zh: 以色列人不太觉得自己是伊朗战争的胜利者
items.summary_zh: 伊朗政权没有改变，核威胁和导弹威胁也没有消除，让许多以色列人想知道这一切是为了什么。

items.title: For Months, Pope Avoided Clash With Trump. Now He’s Clapping Back.
items.summary: President Trump lashed out on Sunday night at Pope Leo XIV, who responded hours later by saying he would continue to oppose war.
items.title_zh: 几个月来，教皇避免与特朗普发生冲突。现在他正在拍手回应。
items.summary_zh: 周日晚上，特朗普总统猛烈抨击教皇利奥十四世，教皇利奥十四世几小时后回应称，他将继续反对战争。

items.title: How Orban Lost His Touch, and Hungary’s Election
items.summary: The election defeat for Prime Minister Viktor Orban is less the result of an ideological shift in Hungary, and more the playing out of a fundamental rule of politics.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班如何失去影响力以及匈牙利大选
items.summary_zh: 总理欧尔班·维克托(Viktor Orban)的选举失败与其说是匈牙利意识形态转变的结果，不如说是基本政治规则的结果。

items.title: Defeat of Orban Removes Ukraine’s Biggest Nemesis in Europe
items.summary: The Hungarian leader’s pro-Moscow tilt cemented his reputation in Kyiv as a spoiler. Now, Ukraine hopes a 90-billion-euro loan he blocked will be disbursed.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班的失败消除了乌克兰在欧洲最大的敌人
items.summary_zh: 这位匈牙利领导人的亲莫斯科倾向巩固了他在基辅破坏者的声誉。现在，乌克兰希望他阻止的900亿欧元贷款能够得到支付。

items.title: Circle CEO says he won’t freeze USDC without a court order even as hackers walk away with millions
items.summary: Circle defends its hands-off approach to freezing funds as critics point to hundreds of millions in losses tied to delayed action.
items.title_zh: Circle 首席执行官表示，即使黑客卷走数百万美元，他也不会在没有法院命令的情况下冻结 USDC
items.summary_zh: Circle 为其冻结资金的不干涉做法辩护，批评人士指出，延迟行动造成了数亿美元的损失。

items.title: Bankers rebuff White House claim that stablecoin yield doesn't threaten deposits
items.summary: A new study from the American Bankers Association says the White House economists went after the wrong premise in their recent look at the issue.
items.title_zh: 银行家反驳白宫声称稳定币收益率不会威胁存款
items.summary_zh: 美国银行家协会的一项新研究称，白宫经济学家在最近研究这个问题时采用了错误的前提。

items.title: Bitmine's Tom Lee calls ether 'the wartime store of value' as holdings hit 4.87 million tokens
items.summary: The company now holds 4.04% of all ether in existence and currently earns $212 million in annualized revenue from staking.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 的 Tom Lee 称以太币为“战时价值储存手段”，持有量达到 487 万枚代币
items.summary_zh: 该公司目前持有现有以太坊总量的 4.04%，目前通过质押获得的年化收入为 2.12 亿美元。

items.title: Foundry unveils Zcash block explorer as mining pool reaches 30% of hashrate
items.summary: The mining pool comes alongside the unveiling of Zcashinfo.com, a block explorer with real-time network and mining data.
items.title_zh: 随着矿池达到算力的 30%，Foundry 推出了 Zcash 区块浏览器
items.summary_zh: 该矿池与 Zcashinfo.com 一起推出，Zcashinfo.com 是一个具有实时网络和挖掘数据的区块浏览器。

items.title: StarkWare cuts staff, reorganizes into two units as it targets revenue
items.summary: StarkWare is cutting staff and restructuring under two units as CEO Eli Ben-Sasson says the firm is "simply too big" to move fast.
items.title_zh: StarkWare 裁员并重组为两个部门以实现收入目标
items.summary_zh: StarkWare 正在裁员并重组两个部门，首席执行官 Eli Ben-Sasson 表示，该公司“太大了”，无法快速行动。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #35.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 35 位。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 170。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Polkadot (DOT)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 39 名。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: ChatGPT for marketing teams
items.summary: Learn how marketing teams use ChatGPT to plan campaigns, generate content, analyze performance, and move from ideas to execution faster.
items.title_zh: 营销团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解营销团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来规划营销活动、生成内容、分析绩效以及更快地将想法转化为执行。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.summary: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.title_zh: 随着 LLM 限制的出现，阿里巴巴领投 2.9 亿美元用于构建新型人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: 初创公司盛树计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型”，为更实际的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 2.9% as all constituents trade lower
items.summary: Polkadot (DOT) declined 11.5% and Cardano (ADA) dropped 6.8%, leading the index lower over the weekend.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：由于所有成分股均走低，指数下跌 2.9%
items.summary_zh: Polkadot (DOT) 下跌 11.5%，Cardano (ADA) 下跌 6.8%，导致该指数周末走低。

items.title: Bitmine holds 4% of ethereum supply as total holdings reach $11.8 billion
items.summary: Bitmine expanded its Ethereum treasury to 4.87 million ETH, controlling 4% of supply as total holdings climb to $11.8 billion.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 持有以太坊供应量的 4%，总持有量达到 118 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Bitmine 将其以太坊金库扩大至 487 万 ETH，控制着 4% 的供应量，总持有量攀升至 118 亿美元。

items.title: ChatGPT for research
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.
items.title_zh: 用于研究的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，以收集资源、分析信息并创建结构化的、有引文支持的见解。

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading — here's why the stock is falling
items.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.
items.title_zh: 高盛股票交易创历史新高，超出预期——这就是该股下跌的原因
items.summary_zh: 高盛第一季度股票交易收入创下历史新高，帮助该公司创下第二高季度收入。

items.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.summary: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥：特习会聚焦贸易和资本流动
items.summary_zh: 桥水基金创始人雷·达里奥 (Ray Dalio) 告诉 CNBC，他对下个月中美两国元首会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 在致股东的年度信中提到了美国成立 250 周年，并呼吁对美国理想做出广泛的重新承诺。

items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班时代被彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）在匈牙利选举中的压倒性胜利所取代
items.summary_zh: 欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的统治结束了，他被一位 45 岁的前党内人士击败，并说服大多数匈牙利人将他赶下台。

items.title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
items.summary: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
items.title_zh: 卡蒂亚·阿德勒：欧洲将感受到布达佩斯的欢乐，但莫斯科却感到寒冷
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司欧洲编辑写道，欧洲领导人与匈牙利人一样，对弗拉基米尔·普京的欧盟盟友被驱逐感到高兴。

items.title: Pope says he has 'no fear' of Trump after scathing criticism
items.summary: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.title_zh: 教皇在严厉批评后表示他“不害怕”特朗普
items.summary_zh: 美国总统指责利奥“在犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策方面糟糕”。

items.title: Britney Spears goes into rehab after driving under the influence arrest
items.summary: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.title_zh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯酒后驾车被捕后进入康复中心
items.summary_zh: 在出庭日期前三周，这位歌手自愿住进治疗机构。

items.title: Ex-Nigerian oil minister denies taking bribes
items.summary: Diezani Alison-Madueke is accused of living “a life of luxury” in the UK at properties paid for and refurbished by industry figures.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚前石油部长否认受贿
items.summary_zh: 迪扎尼·艾莉森·马杜克 (Diezani Alison-Madueke) 被指控在英国过着“奢侈的生活”，其房产由行业人士支付和翻新。

items.title: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
items.summary: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.title_zh: 秘鲁选举在选票交付惨败后陷入第二天
items.summary_zh: 技术和后勤问题意味着秘鲁人选择新总统和国会议员周一将继续投票。

items.title: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
items.summary: The team was returning from a match when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns", officials say.
items.title_zh: 加纳足球运动员在武装袭击者向球队巴士开火后丧生
items.summary_zh: 官员们称，球队在一场比赛归来时遭到“持枪蒙面男子”的袭击。

items.title: Carney on verge of Liberal majority government as votes cast in three by-elections
items.summary: One more seat could solidify the Canadian PM's hold on power after several Conservatives defected.
items.title_zh: 卡尼在三场补选中投票，处于自由党多数政府边缘
items.summary_zh: 在几名保守党人叛逃后，再多一个席位可能会巩固加拿大总理的权力。

items.title: The Dutch village at risk of being demolished
items.summary: Moerdijk has been earmarked for removal, to make way for a vast electricity substation.
items.title_zh: 荷兰村庄面临被拆除的危险
items.summary_zh: 莫尔代克已被指定拆除，为一座大型变电站让路。

items.title: In Myanmar, Even Flowers Stoke Fear
items.summary: Myanmar’s generals have brutalized the country for decades. But they have come to dread garlands as a sign of resistance.
items.title_zh: 在缅甸，连鲜花都会引发恐惧
items.summary_zh: 几十年来，缅甸将军们一直残暴地对待这个国家。但他们开始害怕花环作为抵抗的标志。

items.title: Pope Leo Heads to Africa to Meet the Future of Catholicism
items.summary: On a four-country tour of the continent, where the faith is growing faster than anywhere else, the pontiff will be greeted by enthusiastic crowds and authoritarian leaders.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥前往非洲迎接天主教的未来
items.summary_zh: 在非洲大陆四个国家的访问中，那里的信仰增长速度比其他任何地方都快，教宗将受到热情的人群和独裁领导人的欢迎。

items.title: To Fill Drone Force Ranks, Russia Targets a New Demographic: Students
items.summary: Recruitment sessions have taken place at hundreds of universities and colleges across the country.
items.title_zh: 为了填补无人机部队的空缺，俄罗斯瞄准了新的人口群体：学生
items.summary_zh: 全国数百所大学和学院已举行招聘会。

items.title: ‘The Strangest Sleepover Ever’: Dutch Skeptical as Their Royals Visit Trump
items.summary: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.
items.title_zh: “有史以来最奇怪的过夜”：荷兰皇室成员拜访特朗普时持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 荷兰国王和王后定于周一晚上入住白宫。在跨大西洋局势紧张之际，荷兰不确定对此有何感受。

items.title: Crypto exchange Kraken targeted in extortion attempt but says there was no breach and no client funds at risk
items.summary: The firm said a criminal group is attempting to extort it over limited insider-related data access incidents affecting about 2,000 accounts. Kraken says it will not pay and is working with law enforcement.
items.title_zh: 加密货币交易所 Kraken 遭到敲诈勒索，但表示没有违规行为，也没有客户资金面临风险
items.summary_zh: 该公司表示，一个犯罪团伙正试图通过影响约 2,000 个账户的有限内幕相关数据访问事件来勒索该公司。 Kraken 表示不会支付费用，并正在与执法部门合作。

items.title: Nearly $120 million of XRP just moved to Coinbase in whale transaction
items.summary: XRP is flat over the past 24 hours, but down more than 60% from its summer 2025 peak.
items.title_zh: 近 1.2 亿美元的 XRP 刚刚通过鲸鱼交易转移到 Coinbase
items.summary_zh: XRP 在过去 24 小时内持平，但较 2025 年夏季峰值下跌了 60% 以上。

items.title: World Liberty Financial executes a massive $22 million stablecoin shuffle amid its borrowing controversy
items.summary: The mint and a simultaneous $3 million burn come days after the venture said it had repaid $25 million of the borrowing position that left depositors unable to withdraw from a DeFi lending pool.
items.title_zh: World Liberty Financial 在借贷争议中进行了 2200 万美元的大规模稳定币洗牌
items.summary_zh: 几天前，该公司表示已经偿还了 2500 万美元的借款头寸，导致储户无法从 DeFi 贷款池中提取资金，并同时烧毁了 300 万美元。

items.title: Coinbase shares ‘de-risked’ after selloff with USDC growth boosting Circle outlook: William Blair
items.summary: Shares of Coinbase stock remain roughly 60% below their July 2025 peak of $445, even after a rebound in March.
items.title_zh: 威廉·布莱尔 (William Blair) 表示，Coinbase 股价在抛售后“降低了风险”，USDC 增长提振了 Circle 前景
items.summary_zh: 即使在 3 月份反弹之后，Coinbase 的股价仍比 2025 年 7 月峰值 445 美元低约 60%。

items.title: SEC carves out path for some crypto interfaces to bypass broker registration
items.summary: The SEC said certain user interfaces that allow users to transact and use their crypto wallets may not need to register as broker-dealer.
items.title_zh: SEC 为某些加密接口开辟了绕过经纪商注册的路径
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会表示，允许用户进行交易和使用加密钱包的某些用户界面可能不需要注册为经纪交易商。

items.title: Coinone hit with $3.5 million fine, three-month partial suspension over AML violations: reports
items.summary: Crypto exchange Coinone has been fined $3.5 million and hit with a three-month partial suspension over AML violations in South Korea.
items.title_zh: Coinone 因违反反洗钱法而被罚款 350 万美元，并被部分暂停三个月：报告
items.summary_zh: 加密货币交易所 Coinone 因在韩国违反反洗钱法而被罚款 350 万美元，并被部分暂停三个月。

items.title: Circle CEO Allaire defends decision not to freeze USDC in Drift exploit, citing ‘moral quandary’
items.summary: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire emphasized that the stablecoin issuer has a "very clear performance obligation" to act under the law.
items.title_zh: Circle 首席执行官 Allaire 为不冻结 USDC 漂移利用的决定进行辩护，理由是“道德困境”
items.summary_zh: Circle 首席执行官 Jeremy Allaire 强调，稳定币发行人有“非常明确的履约义务”，要依法行事。

items.title: Attacker exploits Polkadot-based Hyperbridge to mint 1 billion bridged DOT, nets $237K
items.summary: Upbit and Bithumb have since temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals of Polkadot's DOT, citing signs of a security incident.
items.title_zh: 攻击者利用基于 Polkadot 的 Hyperbridge 铸造 10 亿个桥接 DOT，净赚 23.7 万美元
items.summary_zh: 此后，Upbit 和 Bithumb 以存在安全事件迹象为由，暂时停止了 Polkadot 的 DOT 充值和提现。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: ChatGPT for operations teams
items.summary: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows, improve coordination, standardize processes, and drive faster execution.
items.title_zh: 适用于运营团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解运营团队如何使用 ChatGPT 简化工作流程、改善协调、标准化流程并加快执行速度。

items.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
items.summary: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的人工智能应用
items.summary_zh: 探索 ChatGPT、Codex 和 API 等 OpenAI 产品如何将 AI 应用于现实世界的工作、开发和日常任务。

items.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
items.summary: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly.
items.title_zh: 面向财务团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解财务团队如何使用 ChatGPT 简化报告、分析数据、改进预测并更清晰地传达见解。

items.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行头脑风暴
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 集思广益、组织思维，并将粗略的概念转化为结构化、可操作的计划。

items.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.
items.title_zh: 我们对 Axios 开发者工具妥协的回应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过轮换 macOS 代码签名证书、更新应用程序并确认没有用户数据受到损害来响应 Axios 供应链攻击。

items.title: Writing with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行写作
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行写作，以清晰的结构、语气和意图起草、修改和完善内容。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.
items.title_zh: 金融服务
items.summary_zh: 探索金融服务的人工智能资源，包括提示包、GPT、指南和工具，以帮助机构安全地部署和扩展人工智能。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
